title: 3Tdbk6Zvml5Wya7Hvaa17Wssfj6Wm4
summary:
Main
By Fotis Kanatas
Kuwait has uncovered a substantial new oil and gas reserve in the Al-Nokhatha field, with an estimated 2.1 billion barrels of light oil and 5.1 trillion cubic feet of gas. This discovery holds the potential to significantly boost the country's oil reserves and future production capacity. This find is pivotal for Kuwait's energy landscape as the nation plans to almost double its oil output from 2.4 million barrels per day to over 4 million barrels per day by 2035.
